NEW! Funnel #7: The Bot Funnel
The Bot Funnel leads in with authority (case studies or results) and replaces the need for a wufoo form as it segments leads out straight within Messenger.
The difference between this funnel and the others is that - once a lead is deemed good quality - they are sent straight to ScheduleOnce calendar (instead of the first step in your backend
funnel which is the wufoo form).
You can download the full ManyChat Flow (for Coaches & Lead Gen) into your own account by clicking the link below!
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 2 --

STEPS
Step #1: 	Download funnel flow into ManyChat Account
Step #2: 	Create a JSON Message (Growth Tool) and connect it with the new flow
Step #3: 	Edit the flow with your own content, results and tone of voice
Step #4: 	Create a list in your email CRM for leads
Step #5: 	Use Zapier to connect the the flow with email CRM
Step #6: 	Create your FB ad campaign (Messenger Objective) - see below step for instructions on connecting ad to flow
Step #7: 	Go back into the Growth Tools and access JSON Message > click "Edit Messenger Set Up" > select JSON at the top > delete code and paste in code copied from
ManyChat
Step #8: 	Go live with campaign!
Download Coaching funnel to ManyChat: 	https://manychat.com/flowPlayerPage?share_hash=1175422139135068_1d05dbf361856bb20b62126e6fd7e222a3c8451f
Download Lead Gen funnel to ManyChat: 	https://manychat.com/flowPlayerPage?share_hash=1175422139135068_42598ef874f58e61f15a2a811903db8d03d67bbe
